properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6 v7 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are here as we lift You up You are riding on our praise Be enthroned over everything You are seated in our praise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is prophetic I can feel it in the air We lift our praise and You change the atmosphere With hearts open now everybody singing out Oh-oh-oh

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Turn it up this sound of praise Make it louder than any other Lift Him up and shout His name Over all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As we praise, I can feel the change As Your presence now invades Hear the sound of the broken chains Prison doors are giving way

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is prophetic I can feel it in the air We lift our praise and You change the atmosphere With hearts open now everybody singing out I am free!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Our praise goes up Your rain comes down Our praise goes up Your rain comes down Our praise goes up Your rain comes down Our praise goes up Your rain comes down

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: With shouts of praise We celebrate King of glory enter in You are riding on our praise Oh Lord
